title: AIRecommendation
description: Represents the AI system's recommendation in response to an action request. Records which model produced the recommendation, what it recommended, and why. This record is immutable once created and is referenced in the final receipt.

recommendation_id.description: Unique identifier for this recommendation record.

request_id.description: The request_id of the ActionRequest this recommendation responds to. Must match exactly.

model_name.description: Identifier of the AI model or agent that produced this recommendation.

model_version.description: Optional version string for the model. Recommended for reproducibility and audit purposes.

recommended_action.description: The AI system's recommendation on how to handle the action request.

recommended_parameters.description: If recommended_action is proceed_with_modifications, this field contains the AI-suggested parameter changes. Otherwise omit.

recommendation_reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why the AI produced this recommendation. Must be present. This is part of the provenance record.

confidence_score.description: Optional confidence score between 0.0 and 1.0 indicating the model's certainty in its recommendation.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this recommendation was generated.
